titleStmt.title: SII 9.549: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 549. (A.R. No. 178 of 1924.) ON THE WEST WALL OF THE THIRD PRAKARA OF THE KALAHASTISVARA TEMPLE AT KALAHASTI, CHANDRAGIRI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1455, Nandana, Śrāvaṇa, śu. 12, Ravivāsara corresponding to A.D. 1532 July 14 Sunday, in the reign of Achyutadēva-Mahārāya. It records that the king, his queen, Varadambikā, and his son, Chika-Veṁkaṭādri, severally performed the Muktā-tulābhāra ceremony in the presence of the god Hari at Kāñchī. The record is written in Sanskrit verse.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śākē bhūtaśarāṁbudhīṁdugaṇitē varṣē punarnaṁdanē māsē śrāvaṇanāmakē ca vimalē pakṣē ravērvāsarē . dvādaśyāṁ harisannidhau vyaracayanmaktātulāpūruṣaṁ(.) dānaṁ śrīnarasācyutakṣitipatiḥ kāṁcīpurābhyaṁtarē .
muktātulāpūruṣadānavidhau vikī(ṁ)rnnān . muktāmaṇīn samadhikaṁ varadāṁbikāyāḥ . dānāṁbupūraparitān rayatassamētya ratnākaratvamabhajallavaṇākarōpi . kāṁcyāṁ śrīcikaveṁkaṭādrimaṇinā dānē tulābhārakē . saṁpratyā
racitē dvijāssamabhava(ṁ)nnarthātibhārākulāḥ . dhātrīyaṁ kalikalmaṣādadhigatā kṣōṇīpālakumārakā(ḥ)staditarē bhārāya jātā bhuvaḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.549 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
